classifications.cde_rationale: Direct identifier required for KYC and credit-bureau reconciliation; mis-handling triggers GDPR/DPDP exposure.
classifications.classification_rationale: Direct PII identifier; combined with name uniquely re-identifies a borrower.

classifications.cde_rationale: Foundational input to debt-to-income, HMDA reporting and pricing decisions.
classifications.classification_rationale: Sensitive financial attribute; disclosure could harm the borrower.

classifications.cde_rationale: Drives risk-weighting, reserve, and approval gates; CCAR-relevant.
classifications.classification_rationale: Bureau-derived score is regulated under FCRA-equivalent regimes.

classifications.cde_rationale: Drives portfolio exposure metrics, RWA and concentration limits.
classifications.classification_rationale: Material non-public financial value tied to the borrower.

classifications.cde_rationale: Pricing fairness and HMDA disparate-impact testing rely on accurate rate capture.
classifications.classification_rationale: Pricing data; sensitive but not personally identifying.
